overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city at night. The character traverses covered commercial walkways, crosses busy streets with futuristic vehicles, and navigates elevated pedestrian bridges with graffiti-covered walls before descending to a lower level market area with vibrant pink neon lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered commercial walkway with food vendors

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through narrow covered walkway lined with neon food advertisements and metal railings

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow shirt walking toward camera

entered.detail: bright cyan food advertisement with 'Explosion of Taste' text and holographic display
green metal scaffolding and safety railings along the right side of walkway
large glowing food ads covering the left wall with anime-style characters

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow covered commercial walkway illuminated by vibrant cyan neon food advertisements. Metal railings line the right side while holographic ads cover the left wall. A pedestrian in a yellow shirt approaches from the opposite direction.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy city street with traffic overpass

events.description: exits covered walkway onto open city street with moving traffic and tall buildings
futuristic vehicles pass by on the multi-lane road ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and walking along the road edge, observing passing cars and city architecture

notable_agents.action: futuristic sedan driving along the illuminated street
pedestrian with white hair and sunglasses walking past camera

entered.detail: elevated road structure with glowing blue neon trim and multiple levels
multi-story futuristic building with illuminated windows and geometric facade
stream of futuristic cars with headlights on driving through the intersection

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the covered walkway, the scene opens onto a wide city street at night. A futuristic highway overpass looms ahead with glowing blue accents while vehicles drive along the road. The character crosses near the traffic, passing a pedestrian with distinctive white hair.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway leading to upper level stairs

events.description: re-enters covered walkway from the street level
begins ascending staircase to reach elevated pedestrian bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through covered corridor and climbing stairs with green railings to reach upper walkway

entered.detail: entrance back into the covered commercial area with teal and white walls
concrete stairs with green painted railings leading upward

segments.scene_description: The character re-enters a covered walkway, leaving the street traffic behind. Walking through the enclosed corridor, the character approaches and begins climbing a staircase with distinctive green railings, transitioning to an upper pedestrian level.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway with graffiti-covered walls overlooking traffic

events.description: reaches top of stairs and enters elevated walkway with city views

agents.ego_description: walking along elevated walkway, passing other pedestrians, with city traffic visible through railings below

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking in same direction ahead on the elevated path

entered.detail: wall and ceiling covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
green safety railings along the walkway edge overlooking the street
view of traffic and street level visible through the railings

segments.scene_description: On the elevated pedestrian walkway, the character walks past walls covered in vibrant graffiti. Green metal railings line the left side with views of the street traffic below. Other pedestrians share the walkway, walking in both directions along the covered path.

scene_state.functional_zone: staircase descending to lower commercial level

events.description: begins descending staircase from elevated walkway to lower level

agents.ego_description: walking down concrete stairs with green railings toward lower commercial level

notable_agents.action: pedestrian descending stairs ahead of camera

entered.detail: concrete stairs with green railings leading downward to lower level

segments.scene_description: The character leaves the elevated walkway and begins descending a staircase with green railings. The graffiti-covered wall remains visible on the right as the character walks down toward a lower commercial level, following another pedestrian ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level commercial walkway with vibrant pink neon wall panels

events.description: exits stairs into lower covered walkway with distinctive pink neon lighting and market stalls
passes market stall with purple neon umbrella and seated vendors on the left

agents.ego_description: walking through lower commercial corridor with vibrant pink neon walls, passing market vendors and other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: vendor sitting under purple neon-lit umbrella beside the walkway

entered.detail: wall covered in glowing pink textured panels with purple accent lighting
market stall with purple neon lights and large umbrella canopy
large floating advertisement screen with bright graphics

segments.scene_description: Entering the lower commercial level, the character walks through a corridor illuminated by vibrant pink neon wall panels on the right. On the left, a market stall with purple neon lighting and seated vendors occupies the walkway. The character continues forward through this enclosed market area toward a brighter opening ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit urban corridor that transitions from narrow commercial walkways to an open city street and finally to an elevated pedestrian bridge. It begins within a cramped covered walkway illuminated by cyan food advertisements and holographic displays, moving past a pedestrian in a yellow shirt. As the character emerges from the enclosure, the scene opens onto a wide night street dominated by a glowing blue highway overpass and flowing traffic. The camera then follows the character as they leave the street behind to enter another corridor, climbing a staircase with green railings to ascend to a higher level. Finally, the view shifts to an elevated walkway where the character passes vibrant graffiti-covered walls and other pedestrians while overlooking the city traffic below.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character descends from an elevated walkway into a vibrant, neon-lit lower market. It begins with the character walking down a staircase with green railings, passing a graffiti-covered wall on the right while following another pedestrian. As the descent concludes, the scene shifts into a lower commercial corridor where the lighting transforms into a glow of vibrant pink neon panels. The camera then moves forward through this enclosed space, passing a market stall with purple neon lighting and seated vendors on the left, before finally heading toward a brighter opening ahead.
